splits.end_boundary: That is our problem in dealing with young people. May God help us to do so.

files.notes: This file contains the main article 'Moral Guidance of Youth' followed by the beginning of the Editorial section. The article ends with the conclusion about making virtue more attractive than vice, and the editorial section begins with the Relief Society organizational information.

files.notes: This file contains four distinct lesson sections for March, each covering different subject areas: Theology, Work/Business, Literature, and Social Service. Each lesson has clear Roman numeral headings and distinct content boundaries. The file ends with a 'Beautiful Custom' section and advertisements that appear to be part of the Social Service lesson.
